intent_one_liner_cn: 焊 wham/usage 额度自动探活：多 CODEX_HOME → quota_override_latest.json → model_usage_router
user_authorization_cn: 用户你确认：网页额度应自动拉取，不要每次口述；用外部成熟 wham/usage 薄绑
external_mature_refs: knightli.com codex usage quota check script shape
problem_cn: quota_override_latest.json 靠用户口述/旧快照，与网页 Spark/5h/周 脱节，导致 lane 误关误开
execution_order_frozen: implement chatgpt_whatsapp_usage_probe.py (requests, JWT exp check, field normalize)
unit test with fixture JSON from wham/usage response shape
probe all codex_homes; merge into quota_override_latest.json
wire model_usage_router to prefer fresh probe (<15min) before stale override
Temporal activity or ingress pre-dispatch: refresh quota before WORKER_ASSIGNMENT fan-out
emit JSONL pool_id + quota_probe_evidence on worker activator
must_do: 不爬网页 DOM；优先 auth.json + wham/usage
401/403 fail-open：保留上次 override + named_blocker，不阻断主链
与三池焊进并行：探活在 fan-out 前或并行 non-blocking activity
pytest 窄测；禁止 GitHub Actions
must_not: 用户口述当唯一额度源
platform.openai.com billing API 冒充 ChatGPT 订阅配额
acceptance_cn: 脚本/activity 一次跑通三 CODEX_HOME
quota_override 含 spark/main 5h+周百分比与 generated_at
model_usage_router decide_route 读新字段开闭 Spark/C lane
ingress 派工前可见 quota_probe 证据路径
用户无需再口述 Spark 满/空

parallel_dispatch_decision.reason_cn: 额度自动化=调度前提；薄探活不抢 impl 主槽
parallel_dispatch_decision.next_machine_action_cn: 实现 wham probe + 写 override + router 焊进 + 派工前 refresh
